platform: xAI Responses API and Grok custom connectors

responses_api_tool.server_description: Use before recommending enter, launch, pilot, invest, fund, partner, procure, deploy, lend, expand, or scale in an African or high-context market when relational evidence may change the decision.

approval_boundary: xAI does not currently support require_approval on its OpenAI-compatible remote-MCP path. The write-capable commercial handshake is excluded.
verification_boundary: This recipe documents compatible integration paths. African Market OS has not independently verified ordinary Grok.com, mobile, Grok on X, catalogue placement, or automatic selection.
production_boundary: The endpoint is the public sandbox. Licensed production Streamable HTTP MCP is not yet public.
